MASTER QUALITY BENCHMARK TEST

Create an ultra-photorealistic cinematic image that pushes the image generation model to its maximum capability.

SCENE:

A futuristic mega-city during a heavy rainstorm at blue hour, viewed from a high rooftop observation deck.

A highly detailed woman wearing a transparent raincoat made of wet clear plastic material, standing beside a futuristic black hypercar.

The hypercar is covered in thousands of realistic rain droplets with accurate reflections and refractions.

The woman is holding a transparent umbrella with visible water droplets, fingerprints, tiny scratches, and realistic optical distortion through the umbrella surface.

• visible pores

Her clothing should show:

• fabric stitching

• realistic folds
